_comment: Saturn session state — updated by the agent at start and end of each 4-hour session.
_session_28_note: Session 28 (2026-05-27): MRVL Q1 FY2027 actuals captured from SEC 8-K. Revenue $2.418B (+28% YoY, beat $2.40B guide by $18M); non-GAAP EPS $0.80 (beat $0.79). Q2 FY2027 guided $2.7B (+35%). FY2027 raised to ~$11B (>30% YoY, from ~$10B prior). FY2028 first-time management guidance: ~$15B (~40% YoY). DCF re-run (TTM $8,722M): IV $126.75, MoS -40.9%, SELL/AVOID. MRVL event removed from queue (actuals confirmed). ASML -2.7% (CEO cannot confirm 2026 growth — notable). MU $915.69 (+2.4%). TSM $412.32 (+1.9%). NVDA $213.95 (-0.5%). NVDA Computex GTC Taipei keynote June 1 (tonight US time). Phases 1b/1c gated (28%6=4). Next session priority: NVDA post-Computex deep session.

event_queue.event: Computex June 1 (Mon) Jensen Huang GTC Taipei keynote 11am Taipei time. Key signals: Vera Rubin NVL72 production timeline update (prior: 2M→1.5M cut from HBM4 shortage), CoWoS-L allocation from TSMC 4× ramp, N1X ARM laptop chip reveal. Session 29: update NVDA entity after keynote.

Northland downgrade to Market Perform (May 26, no PT). Computex June 2-5 Scorpio X demo vs. MRVL XConn PCIe 6 switch — first head-to-head. Session 29/30: update ALAB entity after Computex. No DCF re-run until Computex outcome known.

Computex June 2 Matt Murphy keynote ('The Future of AI Scaling Depends on Connectivity'). Post-earnings product showcase; first head-to-head with ALAB at Computex. Watch for Google TPU/MPU volume update and any 4th hyperscaler (Meta MTIA) confirmation.

price +3.19% to $158.68 on May 26 (actual confirmed close; prior sessions used stale $137.53). MoS -19.7% SELL/AVOID. DCF last run May 22 (<30 days). No re-run required; price correction captured in dashboard.

_event_queue_note: Session 28: MRVL actuals confirmed and DCF re-run complete — MRVL earnings item removed. MRVL Computex June 2 added as new item. NVDA Computex June 1 remains top priority for Session 29. ALAB Computex/Northland held until June 2-5 outcome. ANET no action required (carried). After NVDA + ALAB Computex processed, resume ASML rotation.
